Container.Name: OpenTickly
Container.Overview: OpenTickly is a free, private-first, self-hosted alternative to Toggl Track.
Container.Description: OpenTickly serves the web UI and Toggl-compatible API from one container. It requires external PostgreSQL and Redis services; install or configure those first, then fill in DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL below. The app listens on container port 8080 and stores durable application data in PostgreSQL.
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL and Redis must be reachable from this container. Create the opentickly PostgreSQL database before starting the app, then set DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL in this template.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the OpenTickly web UI and API.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Redis connection string, for example redis://:password@host:6379/0.
